title: Gantt view grouping subtasks by parent item
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
We are using dependencies to plan projects. Unfortunately it appears to be impossible to sort the subtasks in a clear view. Instead of listing all subtasks of a parent item below that item and THEN starting…

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We are using dependencies to plan projects. Unfortunately it appears to be impossible to sort the subtasks in a clear view. Instead of listing all subtasks of a parent item below that item and THEN starting with the subtasks of the next item bundled together, more often than not there are subtasks of another parent item in between.
This is highly irritating.

Is there an option to reliably group the subtasks by parent item that I am not aware of? If so, where can I find it?

If not this would be a great improvement!

(Speaking of Gantt View sorting I would also appreciate if someone knows the answer to my other thread: Gantt View Widget sorting)

Thank you very much in advance

posts.author: jenstratton (Jen Stratton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Am not sure if I am requesting the exact same use case, but…

We are also using dependencies and subtasks to plan projects. The tasks get pretty granular because they are big projects, so they require using subtasks. We use the timeline and dependency automation, but would like to see all tasks/subtasks in a Timeline/GANTT view.

Because subtasks are not in those views, we have to create a separate dashboard for each project. This is not ideal because it duplicates the number of rows we need to organize into folders on the workplace sidebar and leaves room for error/confusion.

posts.author: LC-toucanBox (Leo Critchley)
posts.cookedHtml: Just a note that I think this use-case might also be helped by an alternative dependecy breakdown view which doesn’t bother with timings. I’ve added a topic for that here: ‘Tree’ view: hierarchical breakdown of dependencies / subitems (bit like Org Chart) - #2 by LC-toucanBox

posts.author: Damiller2 (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Are there any updates on this thread?

The functionality to see subitems grouped by the parent in the gantt chart is vital to how we have our board setup and how we track and manage projects.

posts.author: nathalie.camayd (Nathalie Camayd)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see there is the ability to Group By: “Parent Item” as a secondary setting. However, it still shows each sub-item in order by date for multiple ‘parent items’ rather than by each “parent item”.

For example, I’d like to be able to view the Gantt chart as follows:

GROUP 1
Parent Item 1

  • Task 1 (Timeline & Dependency)
  • Task 2 (Timeline & Dependency)
    Parent Item 2
  • Task 1
  • Task 2
  • … etc.

However, even with the Group By settings selected with Group / Parent Item as the options, it will appear in this format:

GROUP 1

  • Task 1 - Parent Item 1 (Timeline & Dependency)
  • Task 1 - Parent Item 2 …
  • Task 2 - Parent Item 1 …
  • Task 2 - Parent Item 2 …

So either I have a bug or the feature isn’t working as intended. Can we get an update on this thread from the dev team? Thank you!
